name: bynder
description: Twelve specialist skills for implementing and optimizing Bynder DAM-based composable platforms — asset modeling and metaproperties, Brand Guidelines, derivative templates, the bynder-js-sdk, Universal Compact View embedding, Bynder + Contentful pairing, portal and account architecture, permissions and workflow, webhooks and asset events, marketplace connectors, migrations into Bynder, and optimization audits for existing implementations. Production-grade guidance for Slalom's Composable DXP practice.
